base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of score_popups_challenging_bonus — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. Score-popup values shown when hitting enemies: 150 / 400 / 800 / 1000 / 1500 / 3000 — pink text floats briefly at hit location before despawning. 1500 and 3000 reserved for Boss-Galaga + captured-Boss dual-hit rescue. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Score-popup values shown when hitting enemies: 150 / 400 / 800 / 1000 / 1500 / 3000 — pink text floats briefly at hit location before despawning. 1500 and 3000 reserved for Boss-Galaga + captured-Boss dual-hit rescue
